caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a dark vest, and a red cravat, stands and speaks into a microphone in an indoor setting with light-colored wooden slatted walls. He is positioned behind a group of seated people, whose backs are to the camera. The audience includes several women with wavy hair; some wear dark purple or red clothing. A small black object rests on a surface behind the man. The word "ORCA" appears as white text in a black box on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his posture and facial expression as he speaks. The seated audience members remain largely still, and the background and on-screen text remain constant throughout the clip.
